issues.title: Variant missing SKU: Demo T-Shirt - Small
issues.details: Variant ID 2002 has no SKU assigned
issues.recommended_fix: Assign a SKU for inventory tracking and fulfillment

issues.title: Variant has zero price: Demo Hoodie - Medium
issues.recommended_fix: Set a non-zero price or unpublish if this is a placeholder

issues.title: Variant in unpublished product: Demo Cap - Default
issues.details: Product is not published, variant cannot be added to cart
issues.recommended_fix: Publish the product to make it available for purchase

issues.title: Variant allows overselling when out of stock: Demo Socks - One Size
issues.details: Variant ID 2004 has inventory 0 but policy is "continue"
issues.recommended_fix: Change inventory policy to "deny" or restock inventory

issues.title: Product missing image: Demo Backpack
issues.details: Product has no main image in the sample data
issues.recommended_fix: Add at least one clear product image before publishing
